title: More Community Ratings Improvements and other changes

texts: Added a bumping feature to promote reviews. The rating and reviews modal and the identity/ego pages now have multiple sorting tabs for reviews based on recency or promotions. Users need to be logged in and can bump one review every 10 minutes.
Added an identity/ego details tab to the rating and reviews modal.
Changed the layout of the rating and reviews modal to be fixed based on screen rather than content width.
Disabled scrolling for the main page when a modal is open. This affects all modals across the site
Changed clashing description for identity rankings to make it more comprehensive.
Added an extra space at the bottom of the ratings modal to reduce misclicking incidents.
Added small hint texts below text editors to mention markdown and tokens usage.
Changed the behavior of when notifications are loaded/updated to significantly reduce database load.
Fixed a computation bug in the rankings page when editing ratings.
Added a short snippet on the homepage to guide users to the site customization page.
Added the new Pinky logo as an option for icons token type.
Hid the unranked section if there are no unranked identities/egos in the rankings page.
